CLK_DIV

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x8
Size:
0x2
Source:
dac_registers.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[15:8] - - - -
[7:0] clk_div_value rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

clk_div_value

Global DAC clock divider value. Describes a power of 2; 0 means no clock division from system clock, F means 1 << 16 division from system clock.
